title: CameraDevice
description: CameraDevice: A camera object is a electronic security device typically used in closed-circuit television (CCTV) systems.

EyePosition.description: The point at which the Camera is installed, known as the eye position. Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

TargetPosition.description: The point at which the Camera is looking at, known as the target position. Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

Angle.description: Angle of the Camera, known as the real-world angle of what the camera views. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

Mounting.description: The Camera mounting type that describes how it's installed. MountingType: A mounting type that describes how a fitting is installed.

Type.description: The Camera type that describes its characteristics. CameraType: A camera type that describes its basic characteristcs.

Megapixels.description: The Camera megapixels that determines its image quality.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
